# REGIME READ — 2026-06-30

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 4 → 4 (HELD but ACTIVELY TRANSITIONING — Day 5).** Major relief session Mon Jun 29 reverses the Jun 26 breadth-trigger confirmation in one trading day. Nasdaq Comp climbs from −7.0% back to −5.0%, NDX rallies +2.25%, VXN crushes −4.70%. Stage 4 holds technically because (a) VXN 29.37 still above 28 reclaim threshold, (b) TQQQ above 50DMA only session 1 (needs 2+), (c) VIX sub-18 fired Jun 30 intraday but Tue close pending and 2+ sessions required. **But every bullish trigger from prev read is either FIRED or CLOSING FAST. Conservative scoring keeps Stage 4 for one more session — but the underlying signal is Stage 3 reclaim attempt in progress, contingent on Tue close + Wed-Thu confirmation through ISM Jul 1 + NFP Jul 3 cluster.**
- **Total score: −3 → −1 (delta +2, materially less bearish).** Dealer-flow upgrades −2 → −1 on VXN −4.70% one-day crush (largest single-session VXN drop in current Stage-4 cycle); Breadth upgrades −2 → −1 on Nasdaq Comp recovering 2.0 pts back inside −5% threshold (the Jun 26 trigger has UN-FIRED); Sentiment held 0 (VIX sub-18 intraday but conservative scoring waits for 2+ sustained); Macro/Cross-asset/Positioning/Geopolitical held. **Total −1 captures the transition: clearly less bearish than Jun 29 but not yet positive — single-session relief evidence in quarter-end day-of context with NFP Jul 3 in 3 sessions.**
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bearish — VIX daily close above 22 sustained:** **NOT FIRED, GAP WIDENED to 4.57 pts** (17.43 intraday, was 3.69 pts Jun 29; one Monday session of vol-crush extends gap by 0.88 pts).
  - **Bearish — VXN through 34 (52W high):** **NOT FIRED, GAP WIDENED to 4.63 pts** (29.37, was 3.18 pts Jun 29; gap nearly 1.5 pts wider on single VXN crush session).
  - **Bearish — Nasdaq Comp at −7%:** **REVERSED / UN-FIRED.** From −7.0% Jun 26 close to **−5.0% Jun 29 close = 2.0% recovery in one session**. The Jun 26 breadth trigger executed and immediately mean-reverted — classic Stage-4 false-break pattern when VIX-divergent (Sep 2018 anchor confirmed in reverse this time).
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 200DMA $68.09:** **NOT FIRED, GAP WIDENED MASSIVELY** (est. ~$77.02 post-Jun-29 +6.75% TQQQ session vs Jun 26 close $72.15; +13.1% above, was +6.0% Jun 26 = gap RE-WIDENED by 7.1 pts).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (credit data gap persists into Week 2 — known un-refreshed reading).
  - **Bullish — VIX below 18 for 2+ sessions:** **FIRED Session 1 of 2** (17.43 intraday Jun 30 = sub-18 confirmed Day 1; needs Tue Jun 30 close to lock + Wed Jul 1 sustained = 2+ trigger fires Wed close if confirmed). **Was 0.31 pts away Jun 29 — closed gap and crossed in single session.**
  - **Bullish — VXN sub-28:** **NOT FIRED but CLOSING RAPIDLY** (29.37, 1.37 pts away — was 2.82 pts Jun 29; gap HALVED in one session on −4.70% VXN crush).
  - **Bullish — TQQQ above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions:** **FIRED Session 1 of 2** (est. ~$77.02 vs $76.39 = +0.8% above; needs 2+ sessions = Wed Jul 1 close required to lock).
  - **Bullish — Nasdaq Comp back inside −5%:** **FIRED at exactly −5.0%** (recovered from −7.0% in one session — full retracement of breadth trigger).
- **Notable lens flips:** Dealer flow **−2 → −1** (VXN crush −4.70% = single largest dealer release in Stage-4 cycle), Breadth **−2 → −1** (Nasdaq Comp trigger UN-FIRED). Direction net: from clearly bearish −3 to mildly bearish −1 in single session. **The defining Jun 29→30 signal: every bullish trigger has either fired Day 1 (VIX sub-18, TQQQ above 50DMA, Nasdaq Comp inside −5%) or closed gap rapidly (VXN sub-28). Conservative scoring keeps Stage 4 for one more session but the underlying read is Stage 3 reclaim attempt actively in progress. Critical caveat: this is quarter-end Jun 30 day-of = window-dressing reversal risk is structurally elevated.**

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN = Jun 29 Monday close (post-PCE-digestion + post-Jun-26-vol-spike full recovery session). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = Jun 30 Tuesday intraday (today = quarter-end day-of). 10Y last refreshed Jun 26 (held). **Today is Tuesday Jun 30 = quarter-end DAY-OF, 3 trading days from NFP Jul 3.**
>
> **Headline shift #1 — Nasdaq Comp recovers EXACTLY from breadth trigger.** From −7.0% Jun 26 close to **−5.0% Jun 29 close = +2.0% precise retracement back inside threshold**. NDX +2.25% session = mega-cap led the relief, reversing the Jun 26 "mega-cap conceded" framing. **The Jun 26 breadth trigger has UN-FIRED in one session = classic false-break pattern in VIX-divergent Stage 4 setup.** Important: even after the relief, Nasdaq Comp sits AT −5.0% — i.e., it is back to the trigger boundary, not comfortably inside it. One Jun-26-magnitude session = re-triggers.
>
> **Headline shift #2 — VXN −4.70% in one session = dealer release acceleration.** From 30.82 Jun 26 to **29.37 Jun 29 = single largest VXN crush in current Stage-4 cycle**. VIX/VXN spread now 11.94 pts (was 12.51 pts Jun 29) — modestly compressed but Nasdaq-vol still well above broad-vol. **Read: dealers are releasing Nasdaq hedges in lockstep with the NDX +2.25% rally and broad VIX crush — the Jun 29 "premium-rich-on-Nasdaq, premium-cheaper-on-broad" thesis is partially eroding but not gone.** VXN still 1.37 pts above 28 sub-28 trigger; gap halved but not crossed.
>
> **Headline shift #3 — VIX through 18 intraday Jun 30.** From 18.31 Jun 29 → **17.43 Jun 30 intraday = sub-18 fired Day 1 of 2**. Gap to 18 trigger was 0.31 pts Jun 29; crossed and extended to −0.57 pts inside trigger zone. **One Tue Jun 30 close-below-18 confirms Day 1; one Wed Jul 1 close-below-18 confirms full bullish trigger.** This is the most proximate bullish signal but ISM Jul 1 + NFP Jul 3 cluster sit directly in the confirmation window.
>
> **Headline shift #4 — Cross-asset cluster: mild risk-on bid.** Gold $4,046.40 (+0.60% Jun 30) — mild bid back after Jun 29 fade, suggesting flight-to-safety not abandoned but not amplifying. Brent $74.25 (+1.50%) — held the bid, growth concerns easing modestly. DXY 101.36 (+0.24%) — modest USD bid, consistent with risk-on without explicit hawkish-Fed bias. **Cluster reads: bonds bid persistent (10Y unchanged), gold drift sideways, oil mild bid, USD modest bid = mild risk-on without distress signal. Confirms the Jun 29 NDX relief = not a one-day positioning blip; cross-asset is reading along.**
>
> **NDX +2.25% Jun 29 + VIX −0.88 pts Jun 30 intraday = full bullish coordination.** This is the inverse of Jun 26's "mega-cap break + VIX divergence" setup. **Bullish-side vol coordination is what was missing on Jun 26 confirmation; it is present on Jun 29-30 reversal.** Premium-rich → premium-releasing in synchronous step with index recovery = institutional positioning is in active unwinding from Jun 23-26 hedge build.
>
> **DJI/RUT 6 sessions of relative bid running (Jun 22-30 sequence):** DJI +0.59%, RUT +0.01% Jun 29 = quarter-end defensive rotation continuing. **But the relative-bid lag (DJI +0.59% vs SPX +1.18% vs NDX +2.25%) means today's relief is mega-cap-led, not defensive-rotation-led. Pattern shift: the Jun 22-26 defensive-rotation phase has now flipped into mega-cap-led relief Jun 29.** This is critical for quarter-end Jun 30 close-auction direction — positioning is no longer defensively crowded.

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 4 — Regime-change (HELD; ACTIVELY TRANSITIONING Day 5).** Stage 4 thesis: VIX 20-30 rising, breadth deteriorating. **Both criteria now BROKEN in same session:** VIX through 18 intraday (well below 20 floor); breadth trigger un-fired (Nasdaq Comp back inside −5%). Stage 4 holds technically because no bullish trigger has yet locked 2+ sessions — VIX sub-18 = 1 of 2, TQQQ above 50DMA = 1 of 2, VXN sub-28 = not yet. **Conservative scoring keeps Stage 4 for one more session; the data is signaling Stage 3 reclaim attempt actively in progress.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jun 23, 2026 — VXN through 30 + Nasdaq Comp −5% trigger. **Day 5 of Stage 4 = quarter-end day-of (today, Jun 30). Stage 4 unwinding mechanically as bullish triggers fire.**
- **Position:** Stage 4 Day 5 unwinding through quarter-end Jun 30 (today) + ISM Jul 1 (Wed) + NFP Jul 3 (Fri) cluster. **Path-bifurcation tight: bullish triggers actively firing Day 1, but 2+ session confirmation requires clean prints through ISM + NFP. Conservative reading: relief is real but evidence is single-session in quarter-end-day-of context.** Stage 3 reclaim confirmed if Tue + Wed VIX < 18 AND VXN < 28 AND TQQQ holds above 50DMA + Nasdaq Comp closes within −4.5% AND NFP Jul 3 prints in-line / cool with bond bid sustaining. Stage 5 re-entry if quarter-end window-dressing reverses Wed + hot NFP fires Stage-4 NFP precedent.
- **Confidence: Medium.** Same as Jun 29 read but for different reasons. Why Medium (not High): (a) bullish triggers are single-session evidence in quarter-end-day-of context = window-dressing reversal risk; (b) VXN still 1.37 pts above 28 = dealers not fully releasing Nasdaq hedges; (c) ISM Jul 1 + NFP Jul 3 sit directly in confirmation window — Stage-4 NFP precedent is asymmetric bearish (hot = hawkish, cold = recession); (d) Geopolitical lens +2 remains single-point-of-failure for now-mostly-cleared bearish primary cluster. Medium (not Low) because: (1) VIX sub-18 fired with margin (not edge-of-trigger); (2) Nasdaq Comp recovery was full +2.0% retracement of breadth trigger; (3) cross-asset coordination = mild risk-on (no distress signal); (4) NDX +2.25% on full mega-cap participation (not narrow leadership).
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim, multi-condition, NEAR-TERM CONFIRMATION PENDING):** VIX daily close below 18 for 2+ sessions (currently 17.43 intraday Jun 30 = Session 1; **Tue Jun 30 close + Wed Jul 1 close BOTH required**) AND VXN close below 28 (currently 29.37, 1.37 pts away — closing fast but not yet fired) AND TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions (currently est. ~$77.02 = Session 1; **Wed Jul 1 close required**) AND Nasdaq Comp climbs INSIDE −5% with buffer (currently exactly −5.0%, needs ~−4.5% to ~−4.0% for durable read). **Three of four legs in active fire process; VXN is the laggard.**
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5 re-entry):** Quarter-end window-dressing reversal Wed Jul 1 (Stage-4 quarter-end mean-reversion patterns: 6-month Jun 2018 anchor delivered initial relief then sold off Jul 5-10) OR hot NFP Jul 3 (Stage-4 NFP precedent asymmetric bearish) OR VIX re-crosses above 20 (currently 17.43, 2.57 pts away — gap WIDENED but reversible in single session on shock) OR VXN re-tests 32-34 OR TQQQ daily close below 50DMA $76.39 + below 200DMA $68.09 concurrent OR HY OAS through 300 bp OR MOU walk-back / fresh geopolitical shock.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **holds Stage 4 in actively-transitioning Day 5 — relief session Mon Jun 29 reverses Jun 26 breadth-trigger confirmation, every bullish trigger either fired Day 1 (VIX sub-18, TQQQ above 50DMA, Nasdaq Comp inside −5%) or closing fast (VXN sub-28 just 1.37 pts away) — heading into quarter-end Jun 30 close-auction today + ISM Jul 1 + NFP Jul 3 cluster.** Total score improves to mildly negative −1 on dealer-flow + breadth lens upgrades. Medium confidence — single-session relief evidence in quarter-end-day-of context with NFP asymmetric risk ahead.

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUN 30 SIGNAL: Triple bullish-trigger Day-1 fire (VIX sub-18, TQQQ above 50DMA, Nasdaq Comp inside −5%) + VXN closing fast (1.37 pts to sub-28) = coordinated relief, NOT divergent.** The Jun 29 divergence problem (VIX-crush vs breadth-trigger-fire) has resolved in favor of vol-side: breadth caught up. **This is exactly the configuration that disrespect-then-recover patterns deliver in Stage-4 VIX-divergent regimes — Sep 2018 anchor as the closest false-break match (though that one resolved bearish; Apr 2025 tariff-pause anchor delivered durable Stage-3 reclaim from Stage-4 conflicted exit).**
- **VIX/VXN spread compressed to 11.94 pts** (was 12.51 Jun 29). Spread direction now tightening = institutional Nasdaq-concentration thesis erosion in step with NDX recovery. **But VXN still 11.94 pts above VIX = Nasdaq-vol-vs-broad-vol bifurcation REDUCED but NOT RESOLVED.** Reading: dealers seeing concentration risk as easing, not fully cleared.
- **NDX +2.25% session 1 vs DJI +0.59% / RUT +0.01% on Jun 29 = mega-cap participation, defensive-rotation thinning.** Quarter-end-eve flow pattern shifted: 5-session pre-positioning Jun 22-26 (DJI/RUT relative bid) → relief reversal Jun 29 (NDX leadership). **This means the Jun 30 close-auction today is NOT positioning-driven defensive-rotation = different signal than Jun 29 read framed. Window-dressing direction is now ambiguous (could be NDX-led continuation OR DJI/RUT reversal as crowded positions unwind).**
- **Cross-asset coordination = mild risk-on without distress.** Gold mild bid, Brent mild bid off lows, DXY mild bid, bonds bid sustained. **All directional moves modest = no decisive signal in either direction. Cluster confirms equity recovery is real but does not amplify it.** This is the kind of cross-asset background that lets Stage-3 reclaim or Stage-5 re-entry unfold from equity-internal triggers — i.e., cross-asset is NEUTRAL ROOM for either path.
- **Quarter-end Jun 30 day-of context: window-dressing reversal risk is structural.** Stage-4 quarter-end precedent (Jun 30 2018 closest match) delivered initial relief then Jul 5-10 catch-up sell. Today's close-auction direction is the immediate signal — orderly continuation = bullish bias holds; aggressive reversal = re-trigger Stage-4 thesis with vol catch-up risk through Jul cluster.
- **Geopolitical lens +2 single-point-of-failure has REDUCED exposure** as primary bearish cluster shrank −5 → −3. But MOU 11 sessions old and entering historical stress-test window 10-21 days post-signing means lens vulnerability is not zero.
- **TQQQ structural floor $68.09/$68.08 now 13.1% from estimated spot $77.02** (was 5.6% Jun 26). Margin restored materially. EM 5-day lower bound $67.5 sits ~$0.6 below 200DMA = adverse one-sigma path tests but barely breaks 200DMA + 4-wk low concurrent floor. **Asymmetry significantly reduced vs Jun 29 read.**

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~52-56 — back to mid-neutral band on Jun 29 +6.75% session reversal. Broke out of the ~40-43 lower-neutral zone that Jun 26 −3.27% session set up. Not overbought, not oversold = clean neutral. Mean-reversion tailwind diminished but no overbought-reversal pressure either.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS held, DOWNTURN threshold now +9.3% above (HEALTHY).** Est. −12.6% from 4-wk high $88.09 (improved from −18.1% Jun 26); +13.1% above 4-wk low $68.08 (cushion restored). Downturn threshold $70.47 = −8.5% below spot = 4 Jun-26-magnitude sessions of selling required for DOWNTURN switch. EM lower bound $67.5 vs structural floor $68.08 = barely breaches on adverse one-sigma. **Structural backdrop has materially improved — back to mid-band of SIDEWAYS regime.**
- **Trend:** **Price estimated above 50DMA $76.39 (+0.8%, Session 1 reclaim).** 200DMA cushion restored to +13.1% (was +6.0% Jun 26). 50DMA reclaim is single-session — needs Wed Jul 1 close above to lock 2-session sustain. **The Jun 26 "5.5% below 50DMA" condition has reversed in one session by 6.3 pts. Trend backdrop transitioning from below-50DMA-bearish to above-50DMA-neutral-to-bullish (needs confirmation).**
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 29.37 (−4.70% Jun 29) — single largest Stage-4 vol crush, broke sub-30 floor decisively.** Est. TQQQ IV ~88% (from ~92.5% Jun 29). EM ~±12.4%. **The premium-rich-on-Nasdaq thesis is partially eroding — dealers actively releasing Nasdaq hedges in step with NDX recovery.** But VXN still 1.37 pts above 28 sub-28 trigger = institutional Nasdaq-concentration thesis not fully cleared. Premium remains rich enough for tactical sellers but materially less than Jun 26 peak. Reading: dealers in active de-risking phase, not fully normalized — premium structure is more reflective of "stress easing" than "stress absent."
- **Put-selling context: CAUTIOUS (downgraded from HOSTILE).** Downgraded to CAUTIOUS on: (a) **Stage 4 actively transitioning** — every bullish trigger fired Day 1 or closing fast; (b) **TQQQ above 50DMA + structural floor 11.6% below** — both proximate bullish/structural-backdrop signals; (c) **Downturn threshold +9.3% above = HEALTHY** — 4 sessions of selling required; (d) **VXN crushed −4.70%** — premium release evidence; (e) **Cross-asset = mild risk-on without distress**; (f) **EM lower bound $67.5 = barely below structural floor** = much less asymmetric than Jun 29's structural-break-plus-7%. Held CAUTIOUS (not FAVOURABLE) because: (1) **Quarter-end Jun 30 day-of TODAY** — window-dressing reversal risk; (2) **ISM Jul 1 + NFP Jul 3 cluster** — three event-days in 4 sessions (Jul 1 + Jul 3 binding); (3) **All bullish triggers are Session 1 only** — needs Wed + Thu + Fri confirmation through cluster; (4) **VXN still above 28 = dealers not fully released**; (5) **Stage-4 NFP precedent asymmetric bearish** in 75% of historical cases; (6) **Sep 2018 false-break precedent** — initial relief then catch-up sell within 7-10 sessions is the dominant Stage-4 VIX-divergent recovery pattern. **Net: CAUTIOUS — relief is real and broad, but evidence is single-session and quarter-end + NFP cluster sits directly in confirmation window. Materially less hostile than Jun 29; not yet favourable. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
